1.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
1.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

1.gl: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers
the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
1.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
1.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
2.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

2.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
2.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

2.gl: to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc.
2.kj: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, s
[idiom] exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing).

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
3.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

3.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
3.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
3.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

3.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
3.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
4.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

4.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
4.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

4.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
4.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

4.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
4.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

4.gl: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers
a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls)
4.dv: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense;

5.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g
5.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

5.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
5.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

5.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
5.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

5.gl: literally firmness; figuratively security; morally fidelity
5.kj: faith(-ful, -ly, -ness, (man)), set office, stability, steady, truly, truth, verily.

5.gl: properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
